DEFENDANT TOSCO CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2011 Continued To Apr-26-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 220
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court's tentative ruling: Defendant Tosco Corporation's motion for change of venue to Los Angeles County is granted pursuant to plaintiff's statement that it does not oppose a change of venue to Los Angeles. If any party wants a hearing, that party must notify the court by emailing contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm on April 19. No hearing was requested. The tentative ruling will be adopted on April 26, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported = (220/HEK)
